[vc_row type="full_width_background" full_screen_row_position="middle" column_margin="default" bg_color="#ffffff" scene_position="center" top_padding="6%" bottom_padding="3%" text_color="dark" text_align="left" row_border_radius="none" row_border_radius_applies="bg" overlay_strength="0.3" gradient_direction="left_to_right" shape_divider_position="bottom" bg_image_animation="none"][vc_column column_padding="padding-5-percent" column_padding_position="all" background_color_opacity="1" column_shadow="none" column_border_radius="none" column_link_target="_self" width="1/1" tablet_width_inherit="default"][vc_column_text]

Workshops – Suli Breaks

Suli Breaks' workshops take the ideas in his performances and put them to work. Designed for schools, universities, corporate teams, and community organisations, each workshop is a structured, participatory session that gives people the tools to think more creatively, communicate more authentically, and understand their own narrative more clearly.

What Workshops Cover

Suli offers workshops across three core areas. Storytelling for organisations teaches teams to identify and communicate their brand narrative — moving from jargon to language that actually connects. Creative expression and identity workshops, designed primarily for young people and students, explore self-discovery through writing, performance, and spoken word. Entrepreneurship and creative ambition workshops combine practical discussion with artistic inspiration, giving emerging founders a perspective on building ventures where story is the foundation.

Format and Structure

Workshops run from 90 minutes to a full day, depending on depth required. They are practical and interactive — participants write, share, and respond, not just listen. Suli facilitates in a way that draws out contributions from across the room, making space for every type of participant. Sessions can be standalone or run as a series across a term or programme.

Who Workshops Are For

Secondary schools and sixth forms looking to inspire students on creativity, further education and universities building enrichment programmes, corporate teams working on communication, culture, or D&I, and accelerators and start-up programmes that want a creative dimension to entrepreneurship training. Suli has delivered workshops for organisations including LinkedIn and the GSMA, and for schools and colleges across the UK.

Online and Hybrid Workshops

Suli delivers fully virtual workshops using collaborative tools and live facilitation. Hybrid formats — with some participants in-room and others remote — can be accommodated with advance planning. Virtual workshops retain the same participatory structure as in-person sessions.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row] [vc_row type="full_width_background" full_screen_row_position="middle" column_margin="default" bg_color="#f5f4f2" scene_position="center" top_padding="4%" bottom_padding="5%" text_color="dark" text_align="left" row_border_radius="none" row_border_radius_applies="bg" overlay_strength="0.3" gradient_direction="left_to_right" shape_divider_position="bottom" bg_image_animation="none"][vc_column column_padding="padding-5-percent" column_padding_position="all" background_color_opacity="1" column_shadow="none" column_border_radius="none" column_link_target="_self" width="1/1" tablet_width_inherit="default"][vc_column_text]

Frequently Asked Questions

[/vc_column_text] [vc_toggle title="What is the minimum group size?" el_id="what-is-the-minimum-group-size" style="default" size="md" color="Default"]Workshops work best with groups of 15–120. Smaller groups allow for deeper individual participation; larger groups work well with a more structured facilitation approach and can be split into breakout groups.[/vc_toggle] [vc_toggle title="How long is a typical workshop?" el_id="how-long-is-a-typical-workshop" style="default" size="md" color="Default"]The most common format is a 2-hour session. Half-day (3 hours) and full-day workshops are available for organisations that want to go deeper. Suli can also run a 60-minute taster session for events and conferences.[/vc_toggle] [vc_toggle title="Do participants need any prior experience?" el_id="do-participants-need-any-prior-experience" style="default" size="md" color="Default"]No. Workshops are designed to be accessible regardless of background. The focus is on thinking and communication, not performance skill. Participants are invited to share as much or as little as they are comfortable with.[/vc_toggle] [vc_toggle title="How far in advance do I need to book?" el_id="how-far-in-advance-do-i-need-to-book" style="default" size="md" color="Default"]Contact us as early as possible — at least 4–6 weeks ahead for single sessions, longer for programme series.[/vc_toggle] [/vc_column][/vc_row] [vc_row type="full_width_background" full_screen_row_position="middle" column_margin="default" equal_height="yes" content_placement="middle" bg_color="#000000" scene_position="center" top_padding="70" bottom_padding="70" text_color="light" text_align="left" row_border_radius="none" row_border_radius_applies="bg" overlay_strength="0.95" gradient_direction="left_to_right" shape_divider_position="bottom" bg_image_animation="none"][vc_column column_padding="no-extra-padding" column_padding_position="all" centered_text="true" background_color_opacity="1" column_shadow="none" column_border_radius="none" column_link_target="_self" width="1/2" tablet_width_inherit="default"][split_line_heading animation_type="line-reveal-by-space" font_style="h2" text_content="Want to work together?"][/split_line_heading][divider line_type="No Line" custom_height="20"][nectar_btn size="jumbo" button_style="regular" button_color_2="Accent-Color" icon_family="default_arrow" text="Book Suli" url="/contact/" css_animation="fadeIn"][/vc_column][/vc_row]
